'''chadofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyking|dyking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyking|dyking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chadofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chædefeth|chædefeth]] || [[word:chædefej|chædefej]] || [[word:chædefesh|chædefesh]] || [[word:chædefe|chædefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadodofoth|chadodofoth]] || [[word:chadodofoj|chadodofoj]] || [[word:chadodofosh|chadodofosh]] || [[word:chadodofo|chadodofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadofoth|chadofoth]] || [[word:chadofoj|chadofoj]] || [[word:chadofosh|chadofosh]] || [[word:chadofo|chadofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadoffoth|chadoffoth]] || [[word:chadoffoj|chadoffoj]] || [[word:chadoffosh|chadoffosh]] || [[word:chadoffof|chadoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chadofotho|chadofotho]] || [[word:chadofojo|chadofojo]] || [[word:chadofosho|chadofosho]] || [[word:chadofoko|chadofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chadofoth|chadofoth]] || [[word:chadofoj|chadofoj]] || [[word:chadofosh|chadofosh]] || [[word:chadofo|chadofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chadofothol|chadofothol]] || [[word:chadofojol|chadofojol]] || [[word:chadofoshol|chadofoshol]] || [[word:chadofokol|chadofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chadofothotho|chadofothotho]] || [[word:chadofojojo|chadofojojo]] || [[word:chadofoshosho|chadofoshosho]] || [[word:chadofoko|chadofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chadofothon|chadofothon]] || [[word:chadofojon|chadofojon]] || [[word:chadofoshon|chadofoshon]] || [[word:chadofokon|chadofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chadofothoro|chadofothoro]] || [[word:chadofojoro|chadofojoro]] || [[word:chadofoshoro|chadofoshoro]] || [[word:chadofokoro|chadofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
